args.message: Ah yes, that stain — honestly, that's barely anything. I noticed it myself when we first got the car in. It's just a minor surface mark from the previous owner, probably sat there for a while. It's purely cosmetic and doesn't affect the function of the seat at all. As for the electronics and infotainment, everything works perfectly — radio, climate control, touchscreen, all responsive and clean. No issues there whatsoever. This is really a non-issue, my friend.
